91.reason: [Condition should be head < tail, not head <= tail, to avoid accessing uninitialized queue elements]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  The condition should be head < tail to correctly detect empty queue. Using <= causes an extra dequeue attempt when queue is empty.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Incorrect loop condition: should be 'head < tail' because 'tail' points to next empty slot]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Condition should be head < tail, not head <= tail, to avoid accessing uninitialized queue elements]
